summary: Strengthened the parent-owned continuation authority and MergeAutomation handoff validation. The larger topology, replay, and complete observability backlog remains open; pytest is unavailable in this runtime, so focused tests could not collect.

gapStatuses.requirement: Complete continuation authority and identity tuple
gapStatuses.evidence: Authority now requires owner workflow ID, run ID, and the registered MoonMind.MergeAutomation type; UserWorkflow adds owner and child workflow/run identity to its internally authorized handoff; AgentRun diagnostics retain the owner type.

gapStatuses.requirement: Strict typed handoff validation in MergeAutomation
gapStatuses.evidence: MergeAutomation now requires completionDisposition=gated_continuation, the typed contract, reason, execution reference, valid matching head SHA, owner ID/run/type, and child ID/run. Missing continuation is rejected; only an otherwise valid legacy untimed envelope uses fallbackPollSeconds.

gapStatuses.requirement: Full production Temporal topology regression and adverse variants
gapStatuses.remaining: Add and run a time-skipping real MergeAutomation -> UserWorkflow -> AgentRun test plus the verifier-listed adverse outcomes.
Add old failed, new authorized/timed, legacy untimed, and rejected durable histories and Replayer coverage for both patch branches.

gapStatuses.evidence: AgentRun accepted-handoff metadata now includes owner workflow type in addition to owner ID/run.
gapStatuses.remaining: Add normalized continuation/timing/ownership/rejection fields to resolver-attempt artifacts and the requested counters without incrementing failure counters for accepted handoffs.
Align all issue-named lifecycle and terminal-contract documents after the remaining contracts, topology tests, replay fixtures, and metrics land.

targetedLocalChecks.details: The required pytest module is absent; the verifier observed the same pre-collection environment failure.
